name: Fire Emblem: Archanea
description: The original Fire Emblem continuity centered on Marth, Archanea, and related remakes.

eras.title: Original Archanea Era
eras.description: The Famicom and Super Famicom Marth games that established Fire Emblem.

eras.title: Remake and Legacy Era
eras.description: DS remakes and later games that return to or reference the Archanea setting.
